name: codetutorv2
description: An AI-powered programming tutor for VS Code that provides progressive feedback, explanations, and exercises

chatParticipants.name: tutor
chatParticipants.description: An AI-powered programming tutor that helps students learn to code with progressive feedback and interactive exercises

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain code concepts or syntax with year-level appropriate explanations

commands.name: feedback
commands.description: Get progressive feedback on your code using the Socratic method

commands.name: exercise
commands.description: Generate or list programming exercises tailored to your level

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
